# fetchSubscriptions

**Instance Method**

Fetches one or more subscriptions.

## Declaration

```swift
Promise<CloudKit.SubscriptionsResponse, CloudKit.CKError> fetchSubscriptions(
	CloudKit.Subscription|CloudKit.Subscription[]|String|String[] subscriptions
);
```

## Parameters

- **subscriptions**: Possible values are:



## Return Value

A `Promise` object that resolves to a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.SubscriptionsResponse] object, or rejects to a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit/CKError] object.

## Discussion

See [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/DataManagement/Conceptual/CloudKitWebServicesReference/LookupSubscriptionsbyID.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015240-CH17] in [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/DataManagement/Conceptual/CloudKitWebServicesReference/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015240].

## Subscribing to Changes

- **saveSubscriptions**: Saves one or more subscriptions to record changes.
- **fetchAllSubscriptions**: Fetches all subscriptions in the schema.
- **deleteSubscriptions**: Deletes one or more subscriptions.
